member.name: T:QuantityMeasurementApp.AspApi.DTO.QuantityInputDTO
T:QuantityMeasurementApp.AspApi.DTO.QuantityRequestItem
member.summary: One quantity as sent by the client.

member.name: T:QuantityMeasurementApp.AspApi.DTO.QuantityMeasurementResponseDTO
T:QuantityMeasurementApp.AspApi.DTO.ErrorResponseDTO
M:QuantityMeasurementApp.AspApi.Security.PasswordHasher.HashPassword(System.String)
member.summary: Hash a password with a random salt. Returns a string containing SALT||HASH that you store in the database.

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementApp.AspApi.Security.PasswordHasher.VerifyPassword(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Verify a plain text password against a stored SALT||HASH string. Returns true if the password matches.

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementApp.AspApi.Security.PasswordHasher.GenerateSalt
member.summary: Generate a random 32-character hex string to use as a salt. Uses RandomNumberGenerator — cryptographically secure.

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementApp.AspApi.Security.AesEncryptionService.Encrypt(System.String)
member.summary: Encrypt a string. Returns Base64(IV + CipherText). A new random IV is generated each time, so identical inputs produce different outputs — this is correct and expected.

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementApp.AspApi.Security.AesEncryptionService.Decrypt(System.String)
member.summary: Decrypt a Base64(IV + CipherText) string back to plaintext.

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementApp.AspApi.Security.Sha256Hasher.Hash(System.String)
member.summary: Compute SHA-256 hash of a string. Returns a 64-character lowercase hex string.

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementApp.AspApi.Security.Sha256Hasher.HashWithSalt(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Compute SHA-256 hash of a string with an extra salt appended. Useful for hashing tokens, API keys, etc.
